subject: Mathematics
title: Sophie Germain: Secret Scholar
description: Learn Sophie Germain: Secret Scholar in one minute.

hook.text: Sophie Germain stole her father's candles to study math at night. He tried to stop her. She persisted.

buildup.text: Barred from university, she submitted work under a male pseudonym and impressed top scholars.

discovery.text: She made the first real progress on Fermat's Last Theorem, proving it for a whole class of primes.

twist.text: When Gauss learned 'Monsieur LeBlanc' was a woman, he praised her courage and brilliance.

climax.text: She also solved key problems in elasticity theory, helping engineers build the Eiffel Tower decades later.

punchline.text: She hid her identity but couldn't hide her genius.

quiz.question: Why did Sophie Germain use a male pseudonym?
